question_text: What is the definition of a moment?

options.label: A
options.text: The turning effect of a force around a pivot

options.label: B
options.text: The speed at which an object moves

options.label: C
options.text: The amount of force applied to an object

explanation: A moment is specifically the turning or rotational effect that a force has around a fixed point called a pivot. It's what makes objects spin or rotate.
